rationale: Chan et al. (2007) is used for more than background listing: the citing paper explicitly adopts the same behavioral assumption that bidders do not let rivals win at prices they can match. It then contrasts its own modeling task against Chan et al., arguing that Chan et al. do not address hidden nonprice bidder quality in buyer-determined procurement auctions. The citation also appears in the paper's structured prior-work comparison, showing a role in framing the contribution.
relation_description: The citing paper builds on Chan et al. (2007) by carrying forward a core bidding assumption and extending the analysis to a different setting with differentiated bidders and unobserved nonprice quality effects. It positions its model as an extension beyond Chan et al.'s price-only auction context.
